current_plan.description: A full-featured banking system allowing users to manage accounts, perform deposits, withdrawals, and transfers, with secure authentication and persistent data storage.
current_plan.architecture: Three-tier architecture: React frontend communicates with a FastAPI backend via REST API. The backend uses SQLAlchemy/Alembic for ORM and PostgreSQL for persistent storage.

files.purpose: FastAPI application entry point and router setup.
Handles database connection engine and session management.
SQLAlchemy model for user authentication and profile data.
SQLAlchemy model representing a user's bank account (balance, owner_id).
SQLAlchemy model recording all financial transactions.
Pydantic schemas for user registration and login requests/responses.
Pydantic schemas for transaction requests (e.g., amount, recipient_id).
API router for user authentication (login, register).
API router for viewing and managing account details.
API router for processing deposits, withdrawals, and transfers.
Main React component handling routing and layout.
Main dashboard showing account balance and transaction history.
Page dedicated to initiating fund transfers.
Centralized utility for making authenticated API calls to the backend.

build_steps: Setup PostgreSQL database and run initial migrations (Alembic).
Develop backend API endpoints for core functionality.
Develop frontend components and state management.
Integrate frontend with backend API and implement full user flow.

subtasks.name: Phase 1: Database Setup and Core Models
subtasks.description: Establish the database connection and define the core SQLAlchemy models (User, Account, Transaction).

subtasks.name: Phase 2: Backend API Development (Authentication & Accounts)
subtasks.description: Implement user registration, login, and basic account retrieval endpoints.

subtasks.name: Phase 3: Backend API Development (Transactions)
subtasks.description: Implement the core financial logic: deposit, withdraw, and transfer, ensuring ACID properties.

subtasks.name: Phase 4: Frontend Development and Integration
subtasks.description: Build the user interface, handling routing, state, and connecting to the backend API.
